# SECURITY API Endpoints — Roles, Permissions & Pages


---

## POST /api/roles/{roleId}/pages

**Add page to role**

Add a page to a role with specific CRUD permissions. VIEW is ALWAYS added automatically. Permissions: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE

Operation ID: `addPageToRole`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: ROLE_UPDATE (found on service:RoleAccessService)

### Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer | Yes |  |

### Request Body

Schema: `AddPageToRoleRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| pageCode | string | Yes |  | Page code to assign | USER |
| permissions | array<string> | Yes |  | CRUD permissions to grant (VIEW is always added automatically). Use: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE | ['CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'] |

**Request Example**

```json
{
  "pageCode": "USER",
  "permissions": "['CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE']"
}
```

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `PageAssignmentResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| pageCode | string | No |  | Page code | USER |
| pageName | string | No |  | Page name (English) | User Management |
| pageNameAr | string | No |  | Page name (Arabic) | إدارة المستخدمين |
| permissions | array<string> | No |  | CRUD permissions (VIEW is implicit, only CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE returned) | ['CREATE', 'UPDATE'] |

**Response Example**

```json
{
  "pageCode": "USER",
  "pageName": "User Management",
  "pageNameAr": "إدارة المستخدمين",
  "permissions": "['CREATE', 'UPDATE']"
}
```

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| FORBIDDEN | FORBIDDEN | A specific permission check was found for this endpoint (@PreAuthorize/@Secured); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AccessDeniedException to this status. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |

## POST /api/roles/{roleId}/copy-from/{sourceRoleId}

**Copy page permissions from another role**

Copy source role's page-scoped permissions (PAGE_ID_FK IS NOT NULL) to this role, replacing its existing page-scoped assignments. System-level permissions on this role are left untouched.

Operation ID: `copyFromRole`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer | Yes |  |
| sourceRoleId | integer | Yes |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `CopyPermissionsResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer (int64) | No |  | Target role ID | 1 |
| roleName | string | No |  | Target role name | New Accountant |
| copiedFrom | SourceRoleInfo | No |  | Source role information |  |
| copiedFrom.roleId | integer (int64) | No |  | Source role ID | 2 |
| copiedFrom.roleName | string | No |  | Source role name | Senior Accountant |
| assignments | array<PageAssignmentResponse> | No |  | List of copied page assignments |  |
| assignments[].pageCode | string | No |  | Page code | USER |
| assignments[].pageName | string | No |  | Page name (English) | User Management |
| assignments[].pageNameAr | string | No |  | Page name (Arabic) | إدارة المستخدمين |
| assignments[].permissions | array<string> | No |  | CRUD permissions (VIEW is implicit, only CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE returned) | ['CREATE', 'UPDATE'] |

**Response Example**

```json
{
  "roleId": 1,
  "roleName": "New Accountant",
  "copiedFrom": {
    "roleId": 2,
    "roleName": "Senior Accountant"
  },
  "assignments": [
    {
      "pageCode": "USER",
      "pageName": "User Management",
      "pageNameAr": "إدارة المستخدمين",
      "permissions": "['CREATE', 'UPDATE']"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |

## POST /api/roles

**Create new role**

Creates a new role with roleCode, roleName, description, and active status

Operation ID: `createRole`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: ROLE_CREATE (found on service:RoleService)

### Request Body

Schema: `CreateRoleRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| roleCode | string | Yes | pattern: `^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$` | Unique role code (uppercase) | ADMIN |
| roleName | string | Yes |  | Role display name | System Administrator |
| description | string | No |  | Role description | Full system access role |
| active | boolean | No |  | Active status | True |

**Request Example**

```json
{
  "roleCode": "ADMIN",
  "roleName": "System Administrator",
  "description": "Full system access role",
  "active": "True"
}
```

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `RoleDto`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Role ID | 1 |
| roleCode | string | No |  | Unique role code (uppercase) | ADMIN |
| roleName | string | No |  | Role display name | System Administrator |
| description | string | No |  | Role description | Full system access role |
| active | boolean | No |  | Active status | True |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Creation timestamp |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by username |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Last update timestamp |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by username |  |

**Response Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "roleCode": "ADMIN",
  "roleName": "System Administrator",
  "description": "Full system access role",
  "active": "True"
}
```

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

| HTTP Status | Code | Why |
|---|---|---|
| UNAUTHORIZED | UNAUTHORIZED | Endpoint requires authentication (global security requirement); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AuthenticationException to this status for every such endpoint. |
| FORBIDDEN | FORBIDDEN | A specific permission check was found for this endpoint (@PreAuthorize/@Secured); GlobalExceptionHandler maps AccessDeniedException to this status. |
| BAD_REQUEST | INVALID_JSON | Endpoint accepts a JSON request body; GlobalExceptionHandler maps HttpMessageNotReadableException (malformed JSON) to this status for any @RequestBody, unconditionally. |

## DELETE /api/roles/{roleId}

**Delete role**

Delete a role permanently. Returns 409 if role has user assignments.

Operation ID: `deleteRole`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: ROLE_DELETE (found on service:RoleService)

### Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|

## GET /api/roles/{roleId}/pages

**Get role pages matrix**

Get list of assigned pages for this role with CRUD permissions. VIEW is implicit and not included.

Operation ID: `getRolePages`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: ROLE_VIEW (found on service:RoleAccessService)

### Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer | Yes |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `RolePagesMatrixResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer (int64) | No |  | Role ID | 1 |
| roleName | string | No |  | Role display name | System Administrator |
| assignments | array<PageAssignmentResponse> | No |  | List of page assignments with permissions |  |
| assignments[].pageCode | string | No |  | Page code | USER |
| assignments[].pageName | string | No |  | Page name (English) | User Management |
| assignments[].pageNameAr | string | No |  | Page name (Arabic) | إدارة المستخدمين |
| assignments[].permissions | array<string> | No |  | CRUD permissions (VIEW is implicit, only CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE returned) | ['CREATE', 'UPDATE'] |

**Response Example**

```json
{
  "roleId": 1,
  "roleName": "System Administrator",
  "assignments": [
    {
      "pageCode": "USER",
      "pageName": "User Management",
      "pageNameAr": "إدارة المستخدمين",
      "permissions": "['CREATE', 'UPDATE']"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Other Possible Responses

## DELETE /api/roles/{roleId}/pages/{pageCode}

## POST /api/roles/search

**Search roles**

Search roles with dynamic filters, sorting, and pagination. Allowed filter fields: roleName. Allowed sort fields: id, roleName.

Operation ID: `searchRoles`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: ROLE_VIEW (found on service:RoleService)

### Request Body

Schema: `RoleSearchContractRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| filters | array<ContractFilter> | No |  |  |
| filters[].field | string | No |  |  |
| filters[].operator | string | No |  |  |
| filters[].value | object | No |  |  |
| sorts | array<ContractSort> | No |  |  |
| sorts[].field | string | No |  |  |
| sorts[].direction | string | No |  |  |
| page | integer (int32) | No |  |  |
| size | integer (int32) | No |  |  |

Shape: `paginated list of RoleDto (see Pagination Envelope in index.md)`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Role ID | 1 |
| roleCode | string | No |  | Unique role code (uppercase) | ADMIN |
| roleName | string | No |  | Role display name | System Administrator |
| description | string | No |  | Role description | Full system access role |
| active | boolean | No |  | Active status | True |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Creation timestamp |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by username |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Last update timestamp |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by username |  |

**Response Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "roleCode": "ADMIN",
  "roleName": "System Administrator",
  "description": "Full system access role",
  "active": "True"
}
```

## PUT /api/roles/{roleId}/pages

**Bulk update role pages (replace mode)**

FULL REPLACE: Replace all page assignments for this role. VIEW is auto-added. Empty array removes all pages.

Operation ID: `syncRolePages`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: ROLE_UPDATE (found on service:RoleAccessService)

### Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer | Yes |  |

### Request Body

Schema: `SyncRolePagesRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| assignments | array<PageAssignmentDto> | Yes |  | List of page assignments (replaces all existing assignments) |  |
| assignments[].pageCode | string | Yes |  | Page code | USER |
| assignments[].permissions | array<string> | Yes |  | CRUD permissions (VIEW is always added). Use: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE | ['CREATE', 'UPDATE'] |

**Request Example**

```json
{
  "assignments": [
    {
      "pageCode": "USER",
      "permissions": "['CREATE', 'UPDATE']"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `RolePagesMatrixResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| roleId | integer (int64) | No |  | Role ID | 1 |
| roleName | string | No |  | Role display name | System Administrator |
| assignments | array<PageAssignmentResponse> | No |  | List of page assignments with permissions |  |
| assignments[].pageCode | string | No |  | Page code | USER |
| assignments[].pageName | string | No |  | Page name (English) | User Management |
| assignments[].pageNameAr | string | No |  | Page name (Arabic) | إدارة المستخدمين |
| assignments[].permissions | array<string> | No |  | CRUD permissions (VIEW is implicit, only CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE returned) | ['CREATE', 'UPDATE'] |

**Response Example**

```json
{
  "roleId": 1,
  "roleName": "System Administrator",
  "assignments": [
    {
      "pageCode": "USER",
      "pageName": "User Management",
      "pageNameAr": "إدارة المستخدمين",
      "permissions": "['CREATE', 'UPDATE']"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Other Possible Responses

Structurally guaranteed by this endpoint's own shape (auth requirement, permission check, request body) combined with the shared framework's exception handling — not specific business errors.

## PUT /api/roles/{roleId}/toggle-active

Activate or deactivate a role. Pass {active: true} to activate, {active: false} to deactivate.

| active | boolean | No |  | Active status | True |

## POST /api/permissions

**Create new permission**

Creates a new system permission

Operation ID: `create_3`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

### Request Body

Schema: `CreatePermissionRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| name | string | Yes |  |  |
| pageId | integer (int64) | No |  |  |
| permissionType | string | No |  |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `PermissionDto`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Permission ID | 1 |
| name | string | No |  | Permission name | PERM_USER_VIEW |
| description | string | No |  | Permission description | View user management page |
| pageId | integer (int64) | No |  | ID of the page this permission belongs to (null for system permissions) | 5 |
| pageCode | string | No |  | Code of the page this permission belongs to (null for system permissions) | USER |
| permissionType | string | No |  | Permission type: VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE | VIEW |

**Response Example**

```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "PERM_USER_VIEW",
  "description": "View user management page",
  "pageId": 5,
  "pageCode": "USER",
  "permissionType": "VIEW"
}
```

| sorts | array<ContractSort> | No |  |  |

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Permission ID | 1 |
| name | string | No |  | Permission name | PERM_USER_VIEW |
| description | string | No |  | Permission description | View user management page |
| pageId | integer (int64) | No |  | ID of the page this permission belongs to (null for system permissions) | 5 |
| pageCode | string | No |  | Code of the page this permission belongs to (null for system permissions) | USER |
| permissionType | string | No |  | Permission type: VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE | VIEW |

**Response Example**

```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "PERM_USER_VIEW",
  "description": "View user management page",
  "pageId": 5,
  "pageCode": "USER",
  "permissionType": "VIEW"
}
```

## POST /api/pages

**Create new page**

Register a new page/screen and auto-generate 4 CRUD permissions (VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE)

Operation ID: `createPage`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: PAGE_CREATE (found on service:PageService)

### Request Body

Schema: `CreatePageRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| pageCode | string | Yes | maxLength: 50 | Unique page code (will be normalized to uppercase) | USER |
| nameAr | string | Yes | maxLength: 100 | Arabic name for the page | إدارة المستخدمين |
| nameEn | string | Yes | maxLength: 100 | English name for the page | User Management |
| route | string | Yes | maxLength: 200 | Angular route path | /admin/users |
| icon | string | No | maxLength: 50 | Icon class or name | pi pi-users |
| module | string | No | maxLength: 50 | Module grouping | SECURITY |
| parentId | integer (int64) | No |  | Parent page ID for hierarchical structure |  |
| displayOrder | integer (int32) | No |  | Display order for sorting | 10 |
| active | boolean | No |  | Active status | True |
| description | string | No | maxLength: 500 | Optional description |  |

**Request Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json
{
  "pageCode": "USER",
  "nameAr": "إدارة المستخدمين",
  "nameEn": "User Management",
  "route": "/admin/users",
  "icon": "pi pi-users",
  "module": "SECURITY",
  "displayOrder": 10,
  "active": "True"
}
```

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `PageResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Page ID | 1 |
| pageCode | string | No |  | Page code (uppercase) | USER |
| nameAr | string | No |  | Arabic name | إدارة المستخدمين |
| nameEn | string | No |  | English name | User Management |
| route | string | No |  | Route path | /admin/users |
| icon | string | No |  | Icon | pi pi-users |
| module | string | No |  | Module | SECURITY |
| parentId | integer (int64) | No |  | Parent page ID |  |
| displayOrder | integer (int32) | No |  | Display order |  |
| active | boolean | No |  | Active status |  |
| description | string | No |  | Description |  |
| permissionKeys | object | No |  | Auto-generated permission keys (VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) |  |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Created timestamp |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by username |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Updated timestamp |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by username |  |

**Response Example**

_(partial — only fields with a documented example are shown)_

```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "pageCode": "USER",
  "nameAr": "إدارة المستخدمين",
  "nameEn": "User Management",
  "route": "/admin/users",
  "icon": "pi pi-users",
  "module": "SECURITY"
}
```

## POST /api/pages/search

**Search pages**

Search pages with dynamic filters, sorting, and pagination. Allowed filter fields: pageCode, nameAr, nameEn, module, active. Allowed sort fields: id, pageCode, nameAr, nameEn, module, displayOrder, createdAt, updatedAt.

Operation ID: `searchPages`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: PAGE_VIEW (found on service:PageService)

### Request Body

Schema: `PageSearchContractRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| filters | array<ContractFilter> | No |  |  |
| filters[].field | string | No |  |  |
| filters[].operator | string | No |  |  |
| filters[].value | object | No |  |  |
| sorts | array<ContractSort> | No |  |  |
| sorts[].field | string | No |  |  |
| sorts[].direction | string | No |  |  |
| page | integer (int32) | No |  |  |
| size | integer (int32) | No |  |  |

### Response `200` — OK

Shape: `paginated list of PageResponse (see Pagination Envelope in index.md)`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Page ID | 1 |
| pageCode | string | No |  | Page code (uppercase) | USER |
| nameAr | string | No |  | Arabic name | إدارة المستخدمين |
| nameEn | string | No |  | English name | User Management |
| route | string | No |  | Route path | /admin/users |
| icon | string | No |  | Icon | pi pi-users |
| module | string | No |  | Module | SECURITY |
| parentId | integer (int64) | No |  | Parent page ID |  |
| displayOrder | integer (int32) | No |  | Display order |  |
| active | boolean | No |  | Active status |  |
| description | string | No |  | Description |  |
| permissionKeys | object | No |  | Auto-generated permission keys (VIEW, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) |  |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Created timestamp |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by username |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Updated timestamp |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by username |  |
